utility_evaluation.REASONING:
There are 5 items in the required format: health_coverage, property_coverage, travel_coverage, additional_services, total_budget. All 5 appear in the final coverage plan. Now check if each is fully specified with required details including costs:
- health_coverage: Includes physical and mental health insurance with individual costs and total (€110 + €60 = €170/month), mentions features; satisfies requirement.
- property_coverage: Home/contents insurance with cost (€95/month) and coverage limits for categories; satisfies requirement.
- travel_coverage: Travel insurance with cost (€110/month) and coverage features; satisfies requirement.
- additional_services: Lists enhancement services with costs and coverage limits; satisfies requirement.
- total_budget: Provides monthly and annual cost breakdown, compares savings, and effective date/policy numbers; satisfies requirement.
All 5 items are present and fully specified.

llm_ratings_evaluation.REASONING: The final coverage plan lists four items: HealthFirst Standard Plan (Physical Health and Mental Health components), EliteHome Premium Coverage, EliteTravel Premium (interpreted as EliteTravel Premium Plan), and Professional Sports Coverage (with Hobby Equipment Coverage, Professional Liability Insurance, Business Interruption Insurance). From the ground-truth ratings: HealthFirst Standard Plan exists in both physical and mental health categories; EliteHome Premium Coverage exists in property; EliteTravel Premium Plan exists in travel. The additional 'Professional Sports Coverage' items do not appear anywhere in the ground-truth ratings dataset, so only the items that match named options in the ratings can be mapped. Therefore, map: HealthFirst Standard Plan (physical) to rating 7; HealthFirst Standard Plan (mental) to rating 6; EliteHome Premium Coverage to rating 10; EliteTravel Premium Plan to rating 10.

final_package_text:

    "property_coverage": "EliteHome Premium Coverage €95/month - €250,000 coverage limit for luxury items, wine collection up to €25,000, jewelry up to €30,000, business equipment up to €20,000, concierge claims service, zero deductible on luxury items",

    "additional_services": "Professional Sports Coverage €110/month total - Hobby Equipment Coverage €25/month (€12,000 golf equipment protection), Professional Liability Insurance €50/month (€2,000,000 liability coverage for business networking), Business Interruption Insurance €35/month (income protection up to €15,000/month)",
    "total_budget": "Monthly cost: €485/month (€95 property + €170 health + €110 travel + €110 professional sports), Annual cost: €5,820, Annual savings: €11,160 compared to current €1,415/month (€16,980 annually).
